page.config:
Kreator eksportu/importu - podsumowanie #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
#if appvarImportKind = IMPXLS #define PICTUREID PICTURE_WIZZARD_IMP_XLS_STEP3 #define TITLE Pobranie danych z pliku Excel #endif
center
#include "50209" #include "50203"
function setFileInfo(strTitle) page_.ctrl(201).text = strTitle #if appvarImportKind = IMPXML '--peek header and put file info-- dim pModuleImport : set pModuleImport = doc_.getmodule(60145) dim pSI : set pSI = doc_.createstreamobj() pSI.attach strTitle dim pRetrHdr : set pRetrHdr = pModuleImport.retrieve_header(pSI)
if not pRetrHdr.header is nothing then dim strDesc : strDesc = "<brak>" if pRetrHdr.header.isfield("description") then strDesc = pRetrHdr.header.field("description") end if page_.ctrl(CTRLID_IMPXML_DESC).text = strDesc dim strCreated : strCreated = "<nieokreślone>" if pRetrHdr.header.isfield("creation_date") then strCreated = doc_.afc.display.fulldate(cdate(pRetrHdr.header.field("creation_date"))) end if if pRetrHdr.header.isfield("creation_time") then strCreated = strCreated + " " + doc_.afc.display.longtime(clng(pRetrHdr.header.field("creation_time"))) end if if pRetrHdr.header.isfield("application_name") then strCreated = strCreated + " za pomocą aplikacji " + pRetrHdr.header.field("application_name") end if if pRetrHdr.header.isfield("client_machine") then strCreated = strCreated + " na komputerze " + pRetrHdr.header.field("client_machine") end if page_.ctrl(CTRLID_IMPXML_CREATED).text = strCreated end if #endif end function
function fillObjsInfo() #if appvarImportKind <> IMPXML dim pTab set pTab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(300)).removeall #if appvarImportKind <> EXPXML #if appvarImportKind = IMPFRM pTab.newrow.newcell.addtext container().NFIO.description() #else dim i for i = 0 to container().m_pItems.UpperIndex() if (container().m_pItems.value(i).bDisplay) then pTab.newrow.newcell.addtext(container().m_pItems.value(i).m_strName) end if next #endif #else pTab.newrow.newcell.addtext(container().m_oarrExpFilter.Value(container().m_nChoosenFilter).nazwa) #endif #endif end function
